name: Lemon Tuna Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in lemon juice, capers, and olives; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Reduce the heat to lowest setting.
5. Gently mix tuna into the sauce using a fork (do not flake).
6. Drain cooked pasta and add it to the skillet.
7. Combine the remaining butter with the sauce, tossing well to coat the pasta evenly.
